histogram.name: Wallet.NetworkRequest.OauthError
histogram.summary: Records the OAuth errors that occur when the WalletHttpClient requests an access token.

histogram.name: Wallet.NetworkRequest.{RequestType}.HttpResponseOrErrorCode
histogram.summary: Records the http response code or net error code that occur when making a network request to the wallet server for {RequestType}.

histogram.name: Wallet.NetworkRequest.{RequestType}.Latency
histogram.summary: Records the latency of network requests made to the wallet server for {RequestType}. This is an important metric to monitor the health of the integration.

histogram.name: Wallet.NetworkRequest.{RequestType}.ResponseByteSize
histogram.summary: Records the size of network responses received from the wallet server for {RequestType}.

histogram.name: Wallet.WalletablePass.OptIn.Funnel.{PassCategory}
histogram.summary: Records the funnel of events for the {PassCategory} opt-in flow. This identifies whether the user engaged with the opt-in bubble or why the bubble was suppressed. Note that 'User already opted in' and 'Blocked by frequency cap' are logged even when the bubble is not shown. All other events are logged only when the bubble is displayed.

histogram.name: Wallet.WalletablePass.Save.Funnel.{PassCategory}
histogram.summary: Records the funnel of events for the {PassCategory} save flow. This identifies whether the user engaged with the save bubble. All events are logged only when the bubble is displayed.

histogram.name: Wallet.WalletablePass.ServerExtraction.Funnel.{PassCategory}
histogram.summary: Records the funnel of events for the {PassCategory} server extraction flow. This identifies whether the extraction succeeded or why it failed. Note that some events are logged before model execution is attempted.
